title: containers.conf not working in version 1.6.4. Need alternative solution to limit max size of ctr.log
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST

**NOTE** A large number of issues reported against Podman are often found to already be fixed
in more current versions of the project.  Before reporting an issue, please verify the
version you are running with `podman version` and compare it to the latest release
documented on the top of Podman's [README.md](../README.md).  If they differ, please
update your version of Podman to the latest possible and retry your command before creating
an issue.

Also, there is a running list of known issues in the [Podman Troubleshooting Guide](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/troubleshooting.md),
please reference that page before opening a new issue.

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. create containers.conf, and set log_size_max
2. run podman run to create a container


**Describe the results you received:**
ctr.log exceeds the value that was set in log_size_max in containers.conf
This also causes to make the ctr.log take all the space in the home directory.

**Describe the results you expected:**
ctr.log should not exceed the value that was set in log_size_max in containers.conf

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
$ podman version
Version:            1.6.4
RemoteAPI Version:  1
Go Version:         go1.12.12
OS/Arch:            linux/amd64

```

**Output of `podman info --debug`:**

```
$ podman info --debug
debug:
  compiler: gc
  git commit: ""
  go version: go1.12.12
  podman version: 1.6.4
host:
  BuildahVersion: 1.11.5
  CgroupVersion: v1
  Conmon:
    package: conmon-2.0.15-1.el7_8.x86_64
    path: /usr/bin/conmon
    version: 'conmon version 2.0.15, commit: 372b4a12f1c2df4f70c280d41173b60acd3f1260'
  Distribution:
    distribution: '"rhel"'
    version: "7.9"
  IDMappings:
    gidmap:
    - container_id: 0
      host_id: 40
      size: 1
    - container_id: 1
      host_id: 100000
      size: 65537
    uidmap:
    - container_id: 0
      host_id: 132
      size: 1
    - container_id: 1
      host_id: 100000
      size: 65537
  MemFree: 673542144
  MemTotal: 16656891904
  OCIRuntime:
    name: runc
    package: runc-1.0.0-69.rc10.el7_9.x86_64
    path: /usr/bin/runc
    version: 'runc version spec: 1.0.1-dev'
  SwapFree: 17108299776
  SwapTotal: 17179865088
  arch: amd64
  cpus: 4
  eventlogger: file
  hostname: craboolg01
  kernel: 3.10.0-1160.49.1.el7.x86_64
  os: linux
  rootless: true
  slirp4netns:
    Executable: /bin/slirp4netns
    Package: slirp4netns-0.4.3-4.el7_8.x86_64
    Version: |-
      slirp4netns version 0.4.3
      commit: 2244b9b6461afeccad1678fac3d6e478c28b4ad6
  uptime: 2408h 47m 8.59s (Approximately 100.33 days)
registries:
  blocked: null
  insecure: null
  search:
  - registry.access.redhat.com
  - registry.redhat.io
  - docker.io
store:
  ConfigFile: /home/boomi/.config/containers/storage.conf
  ContainerStore:
    number: 1
  GraphDriverName: overlay
  GraphOptions:
    overlay.mount_program:
      Executable: /bin/fuse-overlayfs
      Package: fuse-overlayfs-0.7.2-6.el7_8.x86_64
      Version: |-
        fuse-overlayfs: version 0.7.2
        FUSE library version 3.6.1
        using FUSE kernel interface version 7.29
  GraphRoot: /home/boomi/.local/share/containers/storage
  GraphStatus:
    Backing Filesystem: xfs
    Native Overlay Diff: "false"
    Supports d_type: "true"
    Using metacopy: "false"
  ImageStore:
    number: 1
  RunRoot: /tmp/run-132/containers
  VolumePath: /home/boomi/.local/share/containers/storage/volumes

```

**Package info (e.g. output of `rpm -q podman` or `apt list podman`):**

```
$ rpm -q podman
podman-1.6.4-29.el7_9.x86_64

```

**Have you tested with the latest version of Podman and have you checked the Podman Troubleshooting Guide? (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/troubleshooting.md)**


Have read the Troubleshooting Guide. As for the latest version, we are only using RHEL 7.9, that's why the later versions are not compatible.

comments.body:
Upstream does not support such old versions.
If you need help with RHEL please open a bugzilla.
